title: AIIMS Kalyani Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 03 Field Data Collector Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Kalyani (AIIMS Kalyani) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 03 Field Data Collector Jobs. candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Kalyani Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
